$comment: Origins allowed to appear as string literals in the built bundle.
A new entry here is a deliberate decision: the host serves this app under a
strict CSP, so anything actually fetched from a third party will either be
blocked or leak the visitor's IP. Every entry must say why it is inert or
Adding an origin without a reason defeats the purpose of the check.

origins.https://huggingface.co: Model weights. The only intentional third-party fetch; allowlisted in the host connect-src.
origins.https://cdn.jsdelivr.net: Inert. Transformers.js hardcodes this as its default ONNX Runtime wasmPaths; whisper.worker.ts clears wasmPaths at startup so it is never requested.
origins.https://developer.mozilla.org: Inert. Appears in library error messages and doc links.
origins.https://github.com: Inert. Appears in library error messages and doc links.
origins.https://gist.github.com: Inert. Appears in library error messages and doc links.
origins.https://react.dev: Inert. Appears in React development warnings.
origins.https://web.dev: Inert. Appears in library documentation links.
origins.https://www.w3.org: Inert. XML namespace URIs for inline SVG icons — identifiers, never fetched.
